title: Licensing taskforce report and government response
body: "The industry-led licensing taskforce was set up to review the current licensing system under the Licensing Act 2003. The taskforce concluded on 16 May 2025 and provided government with 10 priority recommendations to consider. The licensing taskforce terms of reference and membership page provides more information on the taskforce, including the purpose and scope.  Government response  The government has accepted the majority of the taskforce’s priority recommendations, subject to further consultation, including:    seeking views on creating a National Licensing Policy Framework to deliver more consistency and transparency across local authorities   considering a licence ‘amnesty’ to modernise and remove outdated conditions from existing licences   exploring longer licensing terms for pavement areas to give businesses greater certainty   reviewing temporary event notice limits to provide more flexibility for operators   strengthening the ‘agent of change’ principle in licensing decisions to protect established venues from the impact of nearby developments   exploring ways to support the creation of hospitality and night-time economy zones   "
